name: immobiliare-crm
description: CRM immobiliare completo per agenzie - Clone originale di Gestim

scripts.dev:local:infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.dev:local:infra:down: docker compose stop postgres redis minio
scripts.dev:local:infra:logs: docker compose logs -f postgres redis minio
scripts.dev:local:ready: npm run dev:local:infra:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev:docker:logs: docker compose logs -f backend frontend postgres redis minio
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd packages/backend && npx prisma db seed

author: Immobiliare CRM Team
